calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Dismissal - No Appearance

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Plaintiff, Zafar Shaikh and Defendants, John Dennis Mantel and Linda Marie Hobbs, both appeared in pro per. The matter did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
